name: SK Gas
message: [AI generated] SK Gas is a South Korean company primarily involved in the liquefied petroleum gas (LPG) industry. It is a subsidiary of the SK Group, one of South Korea's largest conglomerates. SK Gas operates in the import, storage, and distribution of LPG, serving both domestic and international markets. The company also engages in energy-related services and infrastructure development, focusing on sustainable and innovative energy solutions.
